title: gog-cli-mcp configuration
description: Configuration for the gog CLI MCP server
_comment_account: Default Google account for gog commands. Override per-call with the 'account' parameter.
_comment_gogPath: Path to the gog binary. Defaults to 'gog' (assumes it's in PATH).
_comment_transport: Transport mode: 'stdio' (for local agents) or 'http' (for remote clients).
_comment_httpPort: Port for HTTP transport (only used when transport is 'http').
_comment_enabledTools: Tool modules to expose. Remove any to disable. Options: calendar, gmail, contacts, forms, drive, document.
_comment_gmailDraftOnly: If true, gmail.send creates a draft instead of sending. Set false for direct send.
_comment_toolTimeoutMs: Maximum time (ms) to wait for a gog command before timing out.
